task.title: Fix: selected agent card should highlight (not invert) in light theme

messages.content:
## Follow-up task (add to your current worktree commit)

After you finish the approval button task, also fix the agent card selection styling:

**Problem:** In light theme, the selected agent card is visually reversed (dark background / inverted) instead of highlighted (e.g. a colored border or subtle filled highlight).

**What to fix:** In `public/app.js` and/or `public/index.html` / CSS, find the `.selected` or `.active` style for agent cards. In light theme it should show a highlight (e.g. primary color border or light tinted background), not a full color inversion.

Commit this as a separate commit in the same worktree with message: `fix(ui): highlight selected agent card instead of inverting in light theme`

Then report DONE to me with all commit SHAs.
